scene: Stan slumped over a desk in the afternoon, droopy and hollow, a window with a low sun, big black caps THE SLUMP. (Stan is always the same plain crude stick figure: round white head, two dot eyes, a simple line mouth, thin line body and limbs, no hair.) Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A simple wall clock pointing straight up to noon, big black caps IT HAS A NAME. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A robed monk in the desert beside a small red cartoon demon with a name tag, big black caps ACEDIA. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
The red cartoon demon hovering under a harsh overhead noon sun, big black caps THE NOONDAY DEMON. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A big glowing red question mark on a simple flat background, big black caps WHY YOU FEEL GUILTY. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
